chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO. S-1365 OF 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge D/O MATTER. 1. For orders on CMA No.2013 of 2025 2. For orders on CMA No.2014 of 2025 17.03.2025. Mr. Ahmed Hussain Jokhio, Advocate for Petitioner. M/s. Hina and Safdar Ali Depar, AAGs -x-x-x-x-x- Mr. Ahmed Hussain Jokhio, learned counsel for the Petitioner, contends that despite the Court’s Order dated 15.01.2025, Respondents No. 4 to 6 continue to harass the Petitioners and disobey the Orders passed by this Court. He submits that there is a strong likelihood of the Petitioner being murdered in a staged police encounter. He, therefore, prays for the initiation of contempt of court proceedings against the Respondents. Admittedly, the Petitioner was provided protection by this Court vide Order dated 15.01.2025, directing the official Respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with the law and to ensure that no harassment is caused to the Petitioner. The allegations contained in the Contempt Application are serious in nature. However, as no case of contempt is made out, this Petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No. 3 to personally conduct an inquiry into the allegations raised by the Petitioner and take appropriate action in accordance with the law against Respondents No. 4 to 6 if the Petitioner succeeds in establishing the allegations leveled in the Contempt Application. Furthermore, the SSP Sajawal shall provide protection to the Petitioner and ensure that no harassment is caused to him in the future by Respondents No. 4 to 6.

However, as no case of contempt is made out, this Petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No. 3 to personally conduct an inquiry into the allegations raised by the Petitioner and take appropriate action in accordance with the law against Respondents No. 4 to 6 if the Petitioner succeeds in establishing the allegations leveled in the Contempt Application. Furthermore, the SSP Sajawal shall provide protection to the Petitioner and ensure that no harassment is caused to him in the future by Respondents No. 4 to 6. JUDGE Jamil
